article_meta.title: President Donald Trump said Wednesday he wants negotiations to acquire Greenland, portraying the effort as a strategic n

reasoning: The summary consistently attributes claims to Trump, replaces his loaded rhetoric with neutral phrasing, and avoids adopting the article’s or Trump’s framing as fact. It presents facts with attribution and maintains a measured tone.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs with clear attribution (stated, argued, claimed, criticized, accused).
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Contested assertions (WWII history, defense spending) are presented as Trump’s claims, not facts.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: No subjective judgments presented as fact; evaluative language is attributed to Trump.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Tone is measured; avoids Trump’s inflammatory phrasing and dramatic claims.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks by the model.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: Does not infer motives or intentions beyond stated remarks.
custom_reasoning.slant: Reflects the article’s sole perspective (Trump’s remarks) proportionally without overemphasis.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: No perspectives present in the article are omitted.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Adjectives are descriptive and attributed; no loaded terms used by the model as its own voice.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Balanced presentation matching the source; no undue emphasis on negative elements.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No preferential weighting of elite vs grassroots sources beyond article content.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: More neutral than the source’s quoted rhetoric, with consistent attribution and distancing.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Captures all major points raised in the article, including tariffs threat, NATO angle, WWII claims, and no-force stance.
